question: How does Xinpinmu change Temu's competitive positioning internationally?

findings.claim: Temu has a significant brand trust gap: 86% awareness but only 24% repeat purchase intent
findings.data: Brand awareness is 86%, but conversion to actual purchasers is 40%. Only 24% of first-time buyers likely to return. 44% of US adults have used Temu as of January 2025.

findings.claim: 42% of consumers believe Temu product quality is worse than US retailers; Trustpilot score 2.2/5
findings.data: 42% of consumers who are aware of Temu believe product quality is worse than US retailers. Trustpilot score: 2.2/5 (from 49,061 reviews as of Oct 2025). Sitejabber: 2/5 stars from 1,760 reviews. Common complaints: flimsy products, cheap materials, items breaking after few uses. However, monthly shoppers have better perception: 31% said better quality, 32% said comparable.

findings.claim: Temu iOS App Store rating is 4.7/5 across US and major European markets — contradicting review site scores
findings.data: Temu iOS rating: US 4.7/5 (2,072,215 ratings), UK 4.7/5 (368,806), Germany 4.7/5 (194,783), France 4.7/5 (184,616), Italy 4.7/5 (96,299), Spain 4.6/5 (73,281). This high app store rating contradicts the much lower Trustpilot (2.2/5) and Sitejabber (2/5) scores. App Store reviews may be influenced by in-app prompting of satisfied users.

findings.claim: Nearly half of Temu's income comes from high earners making over $190K/year
findings.data: Almost half of Temu's income comes from high earners who make over $190,000/year, suggesting the platform is attracting shoppers who could afford premium products, not just bargain hunters. This contradicts the narrative of Temu as purely a low-income shopping destination.

findings.claim: Temu's quality verification improving in 2026: 87K SKUs with 4.5+ star ratings, 99.3% authenticity for verified items
findings.data: As of early 2026, Temu features over 87,000 SKUs with >=4.5-star verified ratings, >=92% positive return-free feedback, and third-party lab certifications. 'Authorized Brand Store' and 'Temu Verified Partner' badges introduced. Forensic analysis of 1,042 units confirmed 99.3% authenticity for badged items. 24,000+ counterfeit listings removed in Q1 2026.
